steps.t: The first Croft-guard can be found near the silo to the north of Snowbourn. Ecgar has asked you to aid the Croft-guards in the fields of Snowbourn.
The second croft-guard can be found near the silo directly east of Snowbourn. Ecgar has asked you to aid the croft-guards in the fields of Snowbourn.
The last croft-guard can be found at the silo to the south-east of Snowbourn. Ecgar has asked you to aid the Croft-guards in the fields of Snowbourn.
Ecgar can be found in central Snowbourn. You should return to Ecgar and let him know that you have done as he asked.
